full_text:
Cao Fan 曹範
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Fan (曹範). Adopted to continue the line of the deceased Cao Zheng. Died without issue. Cao Fan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cao Fan lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
